title: 'athah #0858
definition:
1) to come, arrive
    1a) (P'al) to come
    1b) (Aphel) to bring
    1c) (Hophal) to be brought
 2) used in the NT in the phrase "maranatha" - "Lord come"
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to come, arrive
    1a) (P'al) to come
    1b) (Aphel) to bring
    1c) (Hophal) to be brought
 2) used in the NT in the phrase "maranatha" - "Lord come"

    NASB:  to come
